epics.title: Expose Goodbye in the songs library

tasks.title: Add a practical chart entry for Air Supply's Goodbye to the existing songs dataset
acceptance_criteria: The songs library contains a visible entry for Goodbye.
The existing score viewer can open the new chart without UI changes.
Source-access uncertainty is preserved in chart notes instead of being hidden.
done_definition: Song data compiles cleanly and renders inside the existing songs workspace.

assumptions: A manual seed inside the existing songs dataset is acceptable before a formal lead-sheet publish pipeline exists for web-sourced charts.
The current viewer can present grouped in-measure chord strings without requiring lyric alignment.
risks: The referenced E-Chords page could not be directly parsed because of an anti-bot challenge, so the digitized chart depends on an accessible mirrored transcription.
Collapsing lyric-aligned chord placements into grouped measures may differ slightly from the exact beat splits of the source chart.
